fields.summary: Adding case_sensitive parameter to groupby() and async_groupby() filters

content:
type: STATUS
files: src/jinja2/filters.py
summary: Implemented case_sensitive param on sync_do_groupby/do_groupby: sort/group key uses ignore_case postprocessor when not case_sensitive, then output grouper key is remapped to the raw (original-case) attribute of the first item in each group. Docstring updated with versionchanged 3.1 note. My local copy has no with_counts/_GroupTupleWithCount changes -- looks like we're on separate copies; will finalize my own patch now.

fields.summary: Implemented case_sensitive param on sync_do_groupby/do_groupby: sort/group key uses ignore_case postprocessor when not case_sensitive, then output grouper key is remapped to the raw (original-case) attribute of the first item in each group. Docstring updated with versionchanged 3.1 note. My local copy has no with_counts/_GroupTupleWithCount changes -- looks like we're on separate copies; will finalize my own patch now.
